ORDER OF EXAMINATION AS TO GILTON, BARRY, CALENDAR OF JUN-24-1999, NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF ARREST TO ISSUE, BAIL $25,000.00

ORDER RE: CONTEMPT OF COURT - IT IS HEREBY ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: BARRY GILTON IS IN CONTEMPT OF THE COURT'S ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. THE CLERK SHALL FORTHWITH ISSUE A BENCH WARRANT FOR THE ARREST OF BARRY GILTON FOR CONTEMPT OF COURT, REQUIRING DEBTOR TO POST AS BAIL CASH OR BOND OF $25,000.00. SEE ORDER FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS. JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
